comment: Single source of truth for the JNI/WASM metric-pack layout, PixelFormat codes, and in-scope JNI symbol surface. Mirrors src/ffi_contract.rs (Rust) — that crate's tests fail the build if this file drifts. Consumers (e.g. HORUS-Vital) pin to a specific HORUS release tag and verify this file + libhorus.so via scripts/sync-horus-sdk.sh + scripts/check-jni-symbols.sh.

metricPack.name: fatigueLevel
metricPack.naWhen: fatigue/stress fusion not warmed up (NaN, not -1)

metricPack.name: stressLevel
metricPack.naWhen: fatigue/stress fusion not warmed up (NaN, not -1)
